# ListVideo

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="ListVideo icon">

## Tags
playlist, video, playback

## Categories
multimedia

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/list-video)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ListVideo;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ListVideo { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
